Cotswold Stone Roofing

Specialising in traditional Cotswold stone roofing — proper materials, tailored solutions, and a finish built to last for generations.

Phone Email

Services

01

New stone roofs

Full installations in traditional Cotswold stone slate, laid in correctly graded diminishing courses.

02

Re-roofing and stripping

Careful strip-and-relay work that re-uses sound existing stone wherever it can be saved.

03

Repairs and maintenance

Storm damage, slipped or cracked tiles, ridge and valley repairs, and general upkeep.

04

Listed buildings and conservation

Sympathetic work that respects conservation area requirements and listed building consent.

05

Moss, lichen and valley clearing

Gentle cleaning and clearing that protects the stone rather than damaging its surface.

06

Emergency callout

Urgent leaks and storm damage — call me directly on 07899941251.

About Me

Roofing that's been part of my life from the start.

I grew up in the Cotswolds, surrounded by the same honey-coloured stone that defines the villages here. I learned the trade from my stepfather, working alongside him for years before taking it on as my own.

Over [X years] since then, I've built a reputation for roofs that are done properly, not just quickly. Real stone, correct technique, and the same care whether it's a small family cottage or a larger family home.

I'm friendly, straightforward, and happy to explain exactly what a roof needs before any work starts — no jargon, no pressure, just honest advice you can trust.

Service Area

Working across the Cotswolds.

Based in the Cotswolds and covering the surrounding villages and market towns. Get in touch with your postcode to check coverage for your job.
